free_text: Radiative capture cross-sections for 3 MeV neutrons
Solid samples were covered by thin polyethylene foils
neutron flux monitored with anthracene scintillator as
Intensities of thermal and epithermal neutrons were
determined and also flux due to deuterons missing the
target, deviations were statistical in origin
errors given include those due to standards
react. uncertainty, beta counting error and statistics
for the decay schemes the data were taken from
Nuclear Data Sheets(1961), the standards cross-sections
used are a best fit to measured and literature values
analyser detected gammas from Al-28 of reaction
measured and gammas from Mg-27 as monitor reaction
